title: THEY UGLIFIED KYOKO SAMA
wikitext:
[]: THEY UGLIFIED KYOKO-SAMA!             Quote Post by Legend of the Past » Thu Jul 27, 2006 9:09 am Why did Unit 02 get such an ugly design in 25'? It's just horrible, really, Kyoko-sama turns in her core.

[]:             Quote Post by Kaysow » Thu Jul 27, 2006 9:17 am From what I can tel, everyone agrees with you

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Thu Jul 27, 2006 12:20 pm I'm not sure why everyone complains about this. It's not really all that different. I mean, they didn't make it green or something.

[]:             Quote Post by Legend of the Past » Thu Jul 27, 2006 12:32 pm They gave it a Harpy Body, damnit. How can you fit Nigouki's head on an Harpy body so it looks right? You can't, because Nigouki's head belongs on Nigouki's body .

[]:             Quote Post by Dr. Strangelove » Thu Jul 27, 2006 12:47 pm I actually like it. Anyone got a better picture?

[]:             Quote Post by Legend of the Past » Thu Jul 27, 2006 1:57 pm http://evacommentary.org/images_illos/honda_ubf.jpg DAY KIRAI! (However that's spelled)

[]:             Quote Post by ZeroFive1 » Thu Jul 27, 2006 2:00 pm I didn't really noticed it, but.... BOOO!

[]:             Quote Post by Zeno » Thu Jul 27, 2006 6:59 pm Didn't notice it until I read this thread to be honest. I think the difference is pretty negligible.

[]:             Quote Post by tinmeigut » Thu Jul 27, 2006 9:37 pm Well I think I noticed something about that when I watch the movie, but didn't really play much attention to it. But is that really an Unit 02 head on a harpies body?

[]:             Quote Post by System Shocker » Thu Jul 27, 2006 11:40 pm Looks like a regular Eva-02 to me and a regular Harpy. I don't know what your fucking problem is it.

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Thu Jul 27, 2006 11:48 pm In all honesty, I was too busy being blown away by the actual animation to stop and whine about the design being less detailed. :roll: When you animate something that fluidly, it's very hard for the animators to keep a high level of detail. Wasn't like, the whole scene rotoscoped? When things are moving that fast and there are that many frames to be animated, they have to sacrifice on the detail a little bit. IMO that scene was awesome and I barely even noticed any changes to the design. It was basically the same, just slightly less detailed.

[]:             Quote Post by rei on your parade » Fri Jul 28, 2006 3:18 pm I've never noticed a difference. Can we get a side-by-side comparison?

[]:             Quote Post by Legend of the Past » Sat Jul 29, 2006 6:19 am It's my geeky side that's a fan of 02. I mean, why did they have to change her body to make it look less good? Nigouki's original body was just fine the way it was, but it sucked to see it so ugly. The whole movie is very sketichly made, at one point the MP EVA's are scarred, the next moment, wham, healed, and the one after that, they're bleeding again. WHY was this overhaul even needed?

[]:             Quote Post by felineki » Sat Jul 29, 2006 7:31 am Timstuff wrote: In all honesty, I was too busy being blown away by the actual animation to stop and whine about the design being less detailed. :roll: When you animate something that fluidly, it's very hard for the animators to keep a high level of detail

[]:             Quote Post by tinmeigut » Sat Jul 29, 2006 8:15 am But actually the Harpies' bodies are supposed to be different from that of Eva-02. Eva-02's chest should be a little bit different from the Harpies. Eva-02 is supposed to be so much prettier than the Harpies.

[]:             Quote Post by Legend of the Past » Sat Jul 29, 2006 8:41 am tinmeigut wrote: But actually the Harpies' bodies are supposed to be different from that of Eva-02. Eva-02's chest should be a little bit different from the Harpies. Eva-02 is supposed to be so much prettier than the Harpies.

[]:             Quote Post by Dr. Strangelove » Sat Jul 29, 2006 11:03 am felineki wrote: Timstuff wrote: In all honesty, I was too busy being blown away by the actual animation to stop and whine about the design being less detailed. :roll: When you animate something that fluidly, it's very hard for the animators to keep a high level of detail

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Sat Jul 29, 2006 11:26 am the movie version of 02 looks a little fatter :o

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Jul 29, 2006 4:56 pm As ever http://www.evacommentary.org/appendix/geektionary.html#egk

[]:             Quote Post by Hand of God » Sat Jul 29, 2006 5:52 pm wait... I'm lost, what's a harpy and what's going on?
